reviews.review_description:
1. Balance VIM
      Make it where VIM tests new features, not gets new features.

2. Mute, not warn, toxicity
     If the community is toxic, get rid of the toxicity. Don’t get rid of the community.

3. Stop forcing money
    Have using money to buy stuff as an option, instead of making it forced or you can’t do what Timmy can do.

4. Declutter

In almost every map, there is stuff on the ground, walls, etc. from past updates. Get rid of it. Have a cleaning update or something.

5. Fix normal problems.
     Normal problems such as spam reporting, map escapes, flying glitches, etc. can be easily fixed. Fix them.

This is feedback.

I used to play this game everyday and it was fun; but the K-ID update has ruined the game i had once loved.

K-ID is trying to scam us all by putting in our parents credit card info, and what not. K-ID is dangerous. 

In conclusion, gorilla tag has been taking to many steps in the wrong direction. Goodbye gorilla tag. I’ll come back when you end your partnership with K-ID.

reviews.review_title: Every parent please listen to this!
reviews.review_description:
If your kids are saying to you they want this game plz say no. Reasons why

1.there is a lot of rude, racist, and weirdos on the game

2.theres this thing called k-id and it's not safe

3.the game is dying

4.theres a lot of cheaters on the game, and false reporter's

So plz say no and just tell your kids to play a different VR game

Lemming if your seeing this please make your game more safer, please Lemming.

reviews.review_title: I don’t get the hate rn.
reviews.review_description: I love gorilla tag, it’s my favorite meta quest game. It’s also the first one I￼’ve ever played. The k-id thing is just protecting people and it’s good. Even though it might be sketchy, you can’t do anything about it. It’s protecting kids and that’s all that matters. I think this best vr game and I hope it stops getting hate. I love gorilla tag and I’ve been playing since 2024. I love gtag and I will never stop loving it. So all the haters, realize, if gtag didn’t make these bad desisions, you wouldn’t have anything to hate on. Gorilla tag brought us together, and made us happy. So please, stop trying to make it worse.

reviews.review_title: ⚠️ YAP WARNING ABT THE K-ID UPD ⚠️
reviews.review_description:
GT is good n all but . . . UHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH, are you actually kidding me right now? I put on my headset, I’m ready to embrace my true form as a legless primate, I’m ready to wall-run until my real-life arms fall off, and what do I see? A SIGN-IN SCREEN? K-ID? MORE LIKE K-BYE-BYE-TO-MY-SANITY!
I am losing it. I am actually, physically, digitally losing my mind! I’ve spent years mastering the art of the branch, I’ve collected shiny rocks like they were the only currency that mattered, and now I’m being told I need "parental permission" for a custom username? I’M A GORILLA! GORILLAS DON’T HAVE EMAILS! GORILLAS DON’T HAVE JURISDICTIONS! WE HAVE LEAVES! WE HAVE FOREST!
My brain is currently a blender full of ^~€[]<€~^3^ and the sound of my own soul screaming into the Virtual Stump. I’m out here trying to trick a €{£[|…€]£] with a picture of Markiplier just so I can talk to another monkey about why the volcano map is the best, and you’re telling me this is "for my safety"? I was safer being chased by a lava monkey in a dark cave than I am staring at a °€72817 screen for 45 minutes!
DGYSUICGHUGQWDCGGYUXQWGUYGXDWGYBUXDW!!! That’s the sound of me trying to explain to my ]£]£[€{ why they need to {€]¥]2]1737€]§ so I can buy a virtual top hat! They think I’m joining a cult! Maybe I am! The cult of the K-ID GLITCH! I have become the G̸L̷I̵T̷C̸H̵ and the pixels are crying monkey tears!
The k-ID FAQ says it won’t slow down the game, but it’s slowed down my will to live! I’m sitting in the Virtual Stump alone because my friends can't €!£]'[£^[¥#' We are a fallen civilization! The age of the monkey is over, and the age of the ACCOUNT SETTINGS has begun!
Hahahahahaha! I’m not even a monkey anymore! I’m just a series of €][_<£]€ I am the king of the §{£<¥< Shiny Rock 1]2[€£I am the emperor of the )#)#(@£]¥[ I have seen the void, and the void is a Terms of Service agreement that I definitely didn't read!

first of all i’m going to say a couple things that ruined the game, first of all the k-id update it’s trying to scam us by putting our family’s credit card and this thing made the game way way worse and i wish you guys delete that..

second i’m going to talk about the nostalgia of the game and how nostalgic it was, there are updates that ruins the game more and more we miss the cosmetics and a lot of other stuff that was in the game before and a lot of changes happened and the more changes happens the more the game gets worse and worse.. i played this game as a kid it was my first game downloaded when i bought my oculus and the more i grew the more i had fun but updates ruined the fun.. im not trying to say the game is bad or its not fun no more.

but lot of toxic people and others ruining the community to this game and i wish lemming or any other moderator sees this review and i hope you guys work on it.. wish u guys a wonderfulday

Keep sweats in competitive lobbies, get the people breaking the rules banned immediately! Just get your butt of the couch, Lemming.

Ducklover8405 what do you mean the reason is because the game is dieing if gorilla tag was dead with no one there still would be one player and that’s me alright so if I play the game for the time u have on every day it would still be alive cause of me gorilla tag is fun even if there is bad updates so if there is a cheater, racist person, toxic person anything like that then leave the code and join a different code or go in your own code or something but I’m still playing gorilla tag no matter what so respect it.

A couple years ago this game was great. I could make new friends in every lobby, find funny cosmetics, laugh at myself when I messed up a jump, and have a good time. Every once in a while someone would say something inappropriate or profane, and the rest of the lobby would team up to make them stop. Now almost everybody in the game bullies people who aren't good and says profane, racist, sexist, and inappropriate things every MINUTE. It is not safe for it's target audience (kids) at all. And of course the game is money hungry to add on to all of that. It supports taking kids' money and telling them stuff they shouldn't be hearing until they're adults. They tried to fix their problems with a "protection" system called K-ID, which is almost unheard of and gives the game all of your kids' information. Sorry for my long review, but I really and truly would not recommend this game to anyone. Cool idea, but it's one downhill so much that it sucks.

I don't know how, I'm always positive, and helping others out and no matter what I do nothing happens, I cant find any solutions to the problem. So now I'm confused, I'm not saying the the game is bad or anything but I realy need some answers.

A gadget for super casual, it’s gonna be rollerskates. So click trigger to deploy wheels/undeploy. They are gonna work like ice under your hands, same fuel as thrusters, and upgrades like boost, extra fuel and joystick control, and you can make your own design.

I really hope you add this, it would be very cool

The moderation in the discord are not professional, the Community moderator has banned me for saying “wow” to a message of him saying the n slur. Dude you are a 45 year old man maybe even older and you were repeating what someone said and you didn’t think too say “n word” and not rhetorical actual word???? Today I got timed out for calling out a person who admitted to being 6 and said the n slur, they didn’t even ban the kid they timed me out for a whole week. Idfc though. The worst part of this whole thing is that no one is talking about this.

reviews.review_title: For ppl saying this game is money hungry
reviews.review_description:
Companies have to make money-another axiom is raising prices just so they can make the same amount of money as before. Upgrading their servers cost a lot of money, so they’re compensating. If you think something is too expensive, save up, or don’t buy it at all.

Also lock in K-I-D is not a big deal

reviews.review_title: Fantastic Gameplay Ruined by Unfair Mods
reviews.review_description: This is a fantastic game with highly engaging worlds to explore, and it doubles as a great workout! However, I am rating it 4 stars due to the prevalence of players using mods and hacks to cheat. This includes exploits like artificial arm-extension and speed boosts, which severely disrupts the competitive balance and ruins the experience for others.

Gorilla tag used to be simple and fun and easy to play you just play tag and buy items and repeat but now there are these “Gamemodes” that no one asked for and the new mining update was fun but playing on a quest 2 it was a lag event and the K-ID update is horrible I wish I could go back to OG G-TAG…

The 2026 april fools was so bad it felt like torture, when I joined the game my screen was tilted and felt so weird and it was much more hard to do stuff and sometimes after like 8 minutes my game crashes so I can't play the game, and sometimes you just get pushed to a wall like a blackhole and I can't even walk.

The Game is Good but my only few complaints are ones we've all heard before. I'll just explain the ones that can be fixed. 
1) City is over cluttered. VIM was good but I honestly feel like the VIM Room should be in VStump and exclusive to those who have VIM. Also, everywhere is just cosmetics and is starting to remove the fun of Minigames since everywhere is just either Shop or Cosmetics. I get it, it's a City, but it shouldnt be THIS cluttered. I say give us back old City. 2023-2024 city

2) VIM is starting to lock actual things behind it's subscription wall. The Lava Map for example. There was no need to lock this behind VIM. Me personally, I think VIM should've been more like an early access type of thing where VIM players could get the Update a week earlier before everyone else, or even a day earlier would be good too. 

Those are most of my complaints that I think need something done with like an overhaul of some sort so yea. 
Overall it's a good game, can get boring pretty quick though.

Every city lobby you go into a modded is there. They can blast music left to right trying to get attention. Some can be annoying. Not just that, they also use it to their advantage. Forest infection for an example. They can use it for speed boost and platforms to be the last. There will be more modders every day with people getting banned a lot causing the game to die. Gorilla tag used to be a fun game. Now, it is just used to test cheats.

Honestly, this game and everyone can relate, this game carried everyone’s childhood. Loading in the game for the first time is weird, no legs and? You walk with hands? But soon, you make friends and start enjoying the game, you’re so excited to get on the game after school, the updates are good, even though they were just stupid cosmetics. After some time, they add more maps, but the game starts to feel weird. You play anyway, laughing with your friends playing tag and just hanging out. More updates happen, now you feel it, the game is different, you no longer feel like actually playing the game after school, they add more maps and get less popular, they add more maps, and get less popular, over and over, you stop playing it and start to play different games, after some time you join back and a message pops up on your screen to verify your age, you put you age and play, but you notice the computer says only 8000 people online, there used to be an average of 30,000, you feel it everywhere, the game, is dead, no one plays it anymore, the updates are dogsh!t and there’s to many maps, will we ever go back to the good old days? So please gorilla tag go back to the good times, but it’s also because gorilla tag didn’t really die, in the end we just got a little older, and for that, this game is a five star no matter all the times I hoped this game never existed….- simply, AzureVR (on YouTube)

reviews.review_title: Don’t Listen to the Lil Timmys
reviews.review_description:
⭐⭐⭐⭐☆ (4/5)

Gorilla Tag is one of the most fun VR games I’ve played. The movement system is unique, the gameplay is exciting, and it’s easy to jump into a match. Whether you’re playing Infection, Casual, or just messing around with friends, there’s always something to do.

Some people complain about toxic or racist kids, but you can simply mute them and report them. Once you do that, the game is much more enjoyable.

The biggest downside is the cosmetics. Many of them are overpriced, and Shiny Rocks (the in-game currency) can be expensive to buy, making it take a long time to get the items you want.

That’s why I’m giving it 4 out of 5 stars instead of 5. The gameplay is amazing, but the cosmetic prices could definitely be better.

Overall, Gorilla Tag is still a fantastic VR game. Don’t listen to the Lil Timmys—mute, report, and enjoy the game.
